title: Xtra Flaky Dutch Fish Papillote
description: A halal-friendly Dutch dish featuring flaky fish cooked in sake, wrapped in papillote, with a bitter twist, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the cod fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together sake, lemon juice, olive oil, dill, salt, and black pepper.
Place a cod fillet in the center of each parchment paper sheet.
Brush the sake mixture evenly over each cod fillet.
Fold the parchment paper over the fish to create a papillote, making sure to seal the edges.
Place the papillotes on a baking sheet and bake for 12 minutes.
Remove the papillotes from the oven and let them cool for 2 minutes.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with additional dill if desired.
